items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a strong wrestling pedigree as a former state champion in Montana.
items.quote: I believe he was a state champion in in um Montana and he has that in his back pocket

items.claim: Tommy McMillan's striking is more refined than Alberto Montes's striking.
items.quote: I think that his striking is more refined than Montes.

items.claim: Alberto Montes possesses a high-level submission game featuring D'arce and Anaconda chokes.
items.quote: this guy has just an incredible assortment of of Dar chokes, Anacondas, that if he can get you in that position, you're cooked.

items.claim: Damen Anderson is a world-class Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt with a modern, wrestling-integrated game.
items.quote: Damen Anderson is a legit worldclass black belt... He's got a very, very modern game, and by that I mean he can wrestle.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott will have a significant size advantage over Damen Anderson due to missing weight and Anderson typically fighting at a lower weight class.
items.quote: Ezra Elliott should be the favorite in that fight, especially now that he's missed weight and he's going to be a lot bigger than a guy that typically fights at bantamweight.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is a long, rangy striker who is more skilled than her recent loss on The Ultimate Fighter suggests.
items.quote: She's really long uh solid rangy striker and she's like a plus 500 underdog... I don't think that that that that's representative of how skilled she is.

items.claim: Siokon Co relies primarily on wrestling and control rather than striking.
items.quote: they should call him the Korean Kabib because all he's been doing really is wrestling and controlling guys.

items.claim: Stuart Nickel is currently on a three-fight losing streak in the UFC.
